notes: Longtime Cherryville burger spot (Lotta Burger / cherry lemon Sundrop), cash-only. Directory-only presence (Yelp/Tripadvisor/edan.io); no business-owned site. Count is Yelp (39); Tripadvisor 4.3, #3 of 21. Phone 704-435-5666.

OSM name misspelled; correct name is 'Manantial Mexican Grill', est. 2013, 1205 Shelby Hwy, 704-435-6887. Has its own domain site (could not grade, returned 403). Tripadvisor 4.3, #5 of 21. Already has a real site = likely not a first-pitch fit.

Institution-tier: awarded Best Burger in NC by Our State Magazine and Charlotte Observer; #1 of 20 in Cherryville. Cash-only. FB page + directories only, no business-owned site. Count 763 is Restaurant Guru aggregate. High capacity signal (notability + review mass), weak web = strong combo.

Homestyle/country-cooking eatery in former Pizza Hut, 1011 E Church St. Site is a SpotHopper vendor template (functional, mobile, online ordering, galleries) — vendor-locked, not owned. Angle would be 'you don't own your site', not 'you have none'.

CONFLICT: Yelp lists CLOSED, but Tripadvisor shows active (#11 of 30, 4.5) and it's described as operating 33 years — verify open before any touch. Owners Lisa Beattie & Brooke Harris. Southern + Chinese/American. FB + edan.io only, no site. 801 W Church St, 704-435-5321.

OSM name off: actual name is 'Tokyo Japanese Restaurant' (the 'Mr Tokyo' brand is Charlotte/Monroe, different owner). 120 N Cherry St, 704-445-4449. Has its own domain site (could not fetch — cert error). Only ~a handful of reviews on Yelp.
Actual name 'Hong Kong Restaurant', 104 N Cherry St, 704-435-2888. Cantonese, buffet. Directory-only (edan.io, menu-world, allmenus); no business-owned site. Count 113 is Restaurantji; Yelp 10.
PERMANENTLY CLOSED: 'Papa's Pizza To Go' shut its Cherryville location Sun June 8 2025; a Pizza Inn franchise opened in the spot June 23 2025. Drop — do not source. Was 1002 E Main St.

Local 3-location family chain (Rutherfordton/Forest City/Shelby) since 1996; 220 Oak St, 828-288-3600. Custom, modern, mobile-friendly site covering all locations (8/10) with online ordering — NOT a fit; already has a strong owned site.

Could not verify a 'China Wall' in Forest City — no listing found. OSM name likely wrong or business closed. Actual Forest City Chinese spots are China Wok (chinawokforestcity.com), China & Hibachi, and Dragon Palace. Recommend dropping this row or re-sourcing the correct name.

Custom cabinet shop, ~26 yrs, 2204 Polkville Rd, Shelby; listed phone 704-473-2222 (differs from the provided 704-487-1733 — reconcile). Directory-only (YP/Yelp/Manta/Houzz), no business-owned site. Owner name NOT retrievable via automated search (NC SoS entity pages 403 to fetch) — do a manual sosnc.gov entity/registered-agent lookup; high-ticket custom work = strong P1/P2-adjacent fit and highest-value non-restaurant in this batch.

TERRITORY: this is the concession grill at Hound's Drive-In Theater (114 Raven Circle, 704-739-4474) — a well-established Kings Mountain attraction with its own site + large FB following and a campground. Grill itself has only 7 reviews (4.9). The drive-in is the real entity and already has web; grill unlikely a standalone target.

DISQUALIFY (P12): the OSM 'Papa's Pizza' at Boiling Springs resolves to a Papa John's franchise (307A E College Ave, 704-434-7797) — corporate-controlled web (papajohns.com). No independent 'Papa's Pizza' found in Boiling Springs. Flag and drop.

Asian/Chinese, family-run, 117 E College Ave near Gardner-Webb, 704-434-9876. Directory/aggregator only (com-fnb, wheree, foursquare); no business-owned site. Solid B2 Storefront candidate (college-town, no site).

Actual name 'Red Wok Express', 610 E Grover St, 704-481-9191; ~24 years in business (longevity signal). Owner referred to as 'Bruno' in customer reviews (first name only, unconfirmed). Directory-only (res-menu.net, zmenu, allmenus); no owned site.
CLOSED: Yelp lists 'Kind' as CLOSED (105 S Main St, coffee/juice/smoothie/bakery). Had FB + IG only, no business-owned site. Drop — do not source. (Closure per Yelp, not confirmed on Google.)

Japanese hibachi express w/ drive-thru, 121 N Main St (uptown Shelby), 704-313-7286. Directory/aggregator only (wheree, ubereats, zmenu, foodjoyy); no owned site. Uptown location = drive-by reachable.

TERRITORY: could not verify a 'Clover Grill' in Kings Mountain — no listing found. OSM name likely wrong or business closed. Nearby real spots: 238 Cherokee Grill, Clover Harvest. Recommend re-sourcing the correct name before spending a KM slot on it.

Homestyle diner (burgers/tenders/breakfast), 131 N Main St, uptown Shelby, 704-434-9336. Facebook-only (QuikSnakLLC), no site — clean B2 Storefront candidate. 'Bulldog' = Gardner-Webb mascot theme; some listings tag Boiling Springs.

NOT a restaurant — a USDA-inspected livermush/sausage MANUFACTURER (livermush, liver pudding, scrapple, souse, salads), est. 1933, 2119 New House Rd, ~50 employees, ~$7.4M revenue; a genuine Shelby/Cleveland County institution (featured in Our State's livermush piece). Listed contact 'Harry Mauney' (704-434-2347) — likely principal. Directory-only (USDA/D&B/Manta), no consumer site. B2B/wholesale, so restaurant-profile fit is weak, but high-capacity local landmark.
